pages.raw_text:
The cement workers have elect
ed new officers. Although the con-
tinued cold weather has caused the
work in this trade to slump, the
union is in good trim, and the men
are looking forward to a busy sea-
son.


The new officers are: President,
]. w. Miller; vice president, H. S.
Davis; financial secretary and
treasurer, F. w. Bender; recording
secretary, G. F. Smith; guide, B. s.
ONeill; guard, w. Owen; trustees.
w. Owen, B. S. O'Neill and F. Will
1iams; delegates to the Building
Trades council, F. w. Bender, F..
Williams and ]. w. Miller; dele
gates to Spokane Central Labor
council. H. Polzin, L. Lexington and
H. s. Davis. The regular meeting
night of the union has been
changed from Tuesday to Friday
night.
